posts.author: Thib (LE MOING Thibault)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

We are a company, that use Monday evryday and we have a projects for our customers to create a graphQL API. We would like to take the Monday API V2 as an exemple, and we would like to know witch framework, language & libraries are used by Monday team for their API V2 documentation.

We would have to have the same documentation structure at least.

Thank you for your awnsers

posts.author: TRB-monday.com (Talia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @Thib!

Thanks for writing in!

Here are some resources to get you started with our API and developer framework.

API Documentation

Head over to our API documentation for a detailed look at our API, including a list of the operations to get and update data from your monday.com account.

Webinar: monday.com for builders

You can also check out our recent API webinar here, which goes through some API use cases and basic API calls.

Developer Community
If you need additional support on our APIs or apps platform, I would recommend doing a search for your question in our developer community here. You can also post to the community to get help from other monday.com developers. The community is managed by members of our dev and CS team.

I hope this helps! Let us know if you have any follow-up questions.

Cheers,

Talia​
